snippet: If someone is concerned about the way the department or a school has handled their own or their child’s personal information, they can make a privacy complaint. Privacy complaints can be directed to the Privacy team at privacy@education.vic.gov.au For information, refer to Make a privacy complaint External Link . Privacy incidents Includes a definition of privacy incidents and information o... Resources Resources page containing supporting resources and links for... Includes information on how to make a privacy complaint. Reviewed 10 July 2025
